requirement_topic.en: NamPower / RED Grid Connection — 220/380 V, 50 Hz, ECB Treatment, and Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: NamPower / RED并网接入——220/380 V、50 Hz、ECB处理及项目验收
requirement_topic.zht: NamPower / RED併網接入——220/380 V、50 Hz、ECB處理及項目驗收

summary.en: Namibia EV charger installations should be treated as project-specific electrical equipment. The practical grid route is: NSI conformity or standards treatment where IEC-based Namibian standards are adopted or referenced, ECB licensing or regulatory treatment where the charging activity affects electricity generation, supply, resale, distribution, or network operation, and connection approval by NamPower for transmission or bulk-supply interfaces or by the relevant Regional Electricity Distributor or municipality for distribution-level sites. Namibia's low-voltage supply is commonly treated as 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. Chargers therefore require Namibian review of input-voltage range, protection settings, earthing, metering, load management, harmonic current, commissioning tests, and thermal derating for high ambient temperatures before energisation.
summary.zh: 纳米比亚电动汽车充电桩安装应按项目专属电气设备处理。实际并网路径为：在采纳或引用IEC体系纳米比亚标准时满足NSI合格评定或标准处理；当充电活动影响发电、供电、转售、配电或网络运营时确认ECB许可或监管处理；并针对输电或批发供电接口取得NamPower接入批准，或针对配电级场站取得相关区域配电商或市政接入批准。纳米比亚低压供电通常按220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz处理。因此，充电桩在通电前须经过纳米比亚侧输入电压范围、保护设置、接地、计量、负载管理、谐波电流、调试测试和高环境温度热降额审查。
summary.zht: 納米比亞電動汽車充電樁安裝應按項目專屬電氣設備處理。實際併網路徑為：在採納或引用IEC體系納米比亞標準時滿足NSI合格評定或標準處理；當充電活動影響發電、供電、轉售、配電或網絡運營時確認ECB許可或監管處理；並針對輸電或批發供電接口取得NamPower接入批准，或針對配電級場站取得相關區域配電商或市政接入批准。納米比亞低壓供電通常按220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz處理。因此，充電樁在通電前須經過納米比亞側輸入電壓範圍、保護設置、接地、計量、負載管理、諧波電流、調試測試和高環境溫度熱降額審查。

standards_or_laws: NamPower connection and customer-supply processes for grid-connected equipment
ECB regulatory treatment under Namibia electricity-sector framework
NSI standards and conformity assessment where Namibian standards adopt or reference IEC standards
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
Namibia low-voltage grid context commonly stated as 220/380 V, 50 Hz

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023 design evidence, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC systems, and local grid-operator project acceptance. China domestic supply is also commonly 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. The nominal voltage match reduces hardware reconfiguration risk, but it does not create NamPower, RED, municipal, or ECB acceptance, and it does not confirm Namibian protection settings, metering, harmonic limits, or installation conditions.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装依据GB/T 18487.1-2023设计证据、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930-2023通信及当地电网运营商项目验收。中国国内供电也通常为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。额定电压相近降低了硬件重新配置风险，但并不形成NamPower、RED、市政或ECB接受，也不确认纳米比亚保护设置、计量、谐波限值或安装条件。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝依據GB/T 18487.1-2023設計證據、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930-2023通訊及當地電網運營商項目驗收。中國國內供電也通常為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。額定電壓相近降低了硬體重新配置風險，但並不形成NamPower、RED、市政或ECB接受，也不確認納米比亞保護設置、計量、諧波限值或安裝條件。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) charger input range covers Namibia's 220/380 V, 50 Hz service and site voltage variation; (2) protective devices, earthing, residual-current protection, metering, and load-management design match the site utility requirements; (3) harmonic and EMC evidence is prepared under IEC 61000 where required; (4) high ambient temperature and solar-exposed installation conditions are covered by thermal derating evidence; (5) the ECB, NamPower, RED, municipality, site owner, and electrical contractor approval path is identified before shipment. China domestic grid acceptance is not a Namibia energisation approval.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩输入范围覆盖纳米比亚220/380 V、50 Hz供电及场站电压波动；(2) 保护器件、接地、剩余电流保护、计量和负载管理设计符合场站公用事业要求；(3) 在要求时准备IEC 61000体系谐波及EMC证据；(4) 以热降额证据覆盖高环境温度及太阳直晒安装条件；(5) 在出货前识别ECB、NamPower、RED、市政、场地方和电气承包商审批路径。中国国内并网验收不是纳米比亚通电批准。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁輸入範圍覆蓋納米比亞220/380 V、50 Hz供電及場站電壓波動；(2) 保護器件、接地、剩餘電流保護、計量和負載管理設計符合場站公用事業要求；(3) 在要求時準備IEC 61000體系諧波及EMC證據；(4) 以熱降額證據覆蓋高環境溫度及太陽直曬安裝條件；(5) 在出貨前識別ECB、NamPower、RED、市政、場地方和電氣承包商審批路徑。中國國內併網驗收不是納米比亞通電批准。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-connected sites: NamPower, RED, municipal, site-owner, and electrical-contractor approval governs energisation; ECB regulatory treatment may apply depending on the charging business model
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a NamPower, RED, municipal, or ECB approval substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Namibia-ready charger package needs site-specific grid evidence, utility connection approval, and high-temperature derating confirmation. Nominal 220/380 V, 50 Hz similarity with China does not remove NamPower, RED, municipal, or ECB project gates.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向纳米比亚的充电桩资料包须包括场站专属电网证据、公用事业接入批准和高温降额确认。与中国同为标称220/380 V、50 Hz并不取消NamPower、RED、市政或ECB项目门槛。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向納米比亞的充電樁資料包須包括場站專屬電網證據、公用事業接入批准和高溫降額確認。與中國同為標稱220/380 V、50 Hz並不取消NamPower、RED、市政或ECB項目門檻。
